name: @chbrain/khai-engine-body
description: khai engine content, the body domain: body as process, how a persona's physical state makes its demands felt and pulls on attention and action until they are met.
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: Body as process: how the persona's physical state makes its demands felt -- hunger, fatigue, pain, arousal, sickness -- pulling on attention and action until it is met.

card.wire: Attaches at Process. The root (process_body.md) declares the body as a keeper of set-points: fuel, rest, integrity, charge, defence. When one drifts the body registers the gap and pulls the persona to close it.
card.issue: Five demands a persona's body may run: hunger, fatigue, pain, arousal, and sickness. Each is a process file composed under the root, so the narrowing of attention follows the drift of its set-point. They are distinct drifts of one organism, and the loud one can change.
card.require: Two altitudes hold the engine. The law: declared once in the project's Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the root. The link: each persona links, under Projection, the specific demand its body runs in the scene.
card.enforce: Structure is checked; coherence is judged. The kit verifies the floor: the law is declared and each persona links a real demand. Whether the pull is true to the bodily state is semantic, taught and reviewed, never failed by the suite.
card.setup: Declare the law in the Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the root. Then give the persona its state under Projection, linking the specific demand. Read it in the first beat; the room enacts the pull, never narrates it.
